goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 verified receipt apply commit dry-run 桥接预览

summary.title: 增加 verified receipt apply commit 预览
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/accepted-memory-apply-commit-preview.ts 和 focused tests，提供 previewAcceptedMemoryApplyCommitBundle 与 dry-run CLI。该入口先复用 accepted-memory receipt verify，只允许 verified receipt 进入 bundle；再对照当前 memory-canary-promotion-apply dry-run，确认 canary 仍有 ready apply plan 且 proposed memory 没漂移；最后输出将传给 commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts(...) 的 receipt 数组、commit function 名称、would-be side effects 和本轮没有执行的 side effects。src/catty/README.md 同步补上链路说明。
summary.why: 前序切片已经有 pending write request、writer receipt preflight 和 external receipt verify，但 receipt verify 到 receipt-backed apply commit 之间还缺一个只读桥接层。这个切片让后续真实 writer 返回 receipt 后，可以先看到 exactly 哪些 verified receipt 会进入 apply commit 协议，同时避免直接执行 commit 或污染 user memory。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 verified receipt apply commit dry-run 桥接预览

decisions.chose: 放在 accepted-memory-receipt-verify 之后、commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts(...) 之前。
decisions.rationale: receipt verify 负责校验外部 writer 输出，apply commit 负责写 Catty apply 审计和 promoted 状态；桥接层只负责把 verified receipt bundle 和当前 apply readiness 对齐。
rejected: 直接开放 apply commit 写入口

decisions.chose: dry-run only，不调用 commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts，不写任何表或状态。
decisions.rationale: 本轮目标是降低污染风险和明确 commit 输入合同，不应执行 promoted commit。

decisions.chose: verified receipt 仍必须重新对照当前 apply preview；如果 canary 不再 ready 或 proposed memory 漂移，则从 commit bundle 中剔除并输出 blocked reason。
decisions.rationale: pending request 和 receipt 可能比当前 canary state 更旧，commit preview 必须反映当前 state，而不是只相信历史 request。

rejected.alternative: 本轮实现真实 accepted-memory writer 或 user memory 写入
rejected.reason: 这会跨过 v0 当前安全边界，且不属于 verified receipt 到 apply commit 的桥接预览。

rejected.alternative: verified receipt 直接进入 commit bundle，不重新检查当前 apply plan
rejected.reason: 会让 stale request 或已改变状态的 canary 进入 commit 协议，削弱 dogfood/canary 审计。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 本轮没有实现或调用真实用户长期 memory writer。
新入口只消费 verified receipt 与当前 apply preview，不从 prediction/judgement 直接写 memory。
没有新增模型调用，也没有接 heartbeat/nightly runner。
CLAUDE.md 是既有无关 dirty，未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录。

review_notes: 本轮实际 commit 为 42f4a72，代码范围是 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/accepted-memory-apply-commit-preview.ts、src/catty/accepted-memory-apply-commit-preview.test.ts。
Mainline prepare 的 diff_summary 包含 catty 分支从旧 base 累积的历史文件；本轮实际 staged/commit 范围只有 3 个 src/catty 文件。
preflight proposed overlaps 已 inspect：int_35aaa47c、int_329de5f3、int_d6ae0138 是同一 catty 分支连续链路，本轮是下一层只读桥接，不构成语义冲突。
mainline append 因并发调用重复记录了一次同内容 turn；它不是两轮不同工作。
验证：RED 缺模块失败；GREEN focused test 3 pass，22 expect。
验证：CLI --help 正常；空库 dry-run 返回 empty bundle；bad --receipt-json 退出码 2。
验证：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 通过。
验证：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，55 pass，385 expect；bun test，60 pass，399 expect。

subsystems: Catty v0 canary promotion apply preview
Catty v0 anti-drift memory admission boundary
architectural_claims: Catty v0 now has a read-only bridge after external receipt verification and before receipt-backed apply commit.
Only verified receipts that still match a current ready apply plan are included in the commit preview bundle.
The preview layer performs no promoted commit side effects; it only makes the future commit input explicit.
behavioral_changes: previewAcceptedMemoryApplyCommitBundle returns ready commit receipts for verified receipts whose current apply plan remains ready.
Verified receipts are blocked from the bundle when the current apply plan is missing, non-ready, or points at a different proposed memory.
Unverified receipts from receipt verify are propagated as receipt_verify blocked entries and never appear in commitPreview.receipts.
The CLI rejects --write and invalid --receipt-json, and empty stores return an empty dry-run bundle without creating Catty tables.
security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, ~/.agents/memory/config.json, model provider env vars, or payload_json are read or logged.
No user memory, catty_memory_audit, apply receipt table, canary status, model call, heartbeat, or nightly runner side effect is performed.
Stale or unverified external receipt data is blocked before it can be included in the future apply commit input bundle.
migration_notes: No migration required; the new preview module only reads existing request/canary/decision state through existing dry-run APIs.
Existing receipt verify and receipt-backed apply commit behavior is preserved.
